summary_one_line: Profile-class/colorspace signature bytes that build a pipeline whose stage Type differs from the expected va_arg signature, taking the mismatch branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Header signature bytes at offsets 0x0c-0x16 (profile-class + input/output colorspace fourcc) that decode into a color-transform pipeline whose stage signature sequence (mpe->Type) does NOT equal the four-element expected list cmsSigCurveSetElemType/cmsSigMatrixElemType/cmsSigMatrixElemType/cmsSigCurveSetElemType passed via va_arg at the cmsopt.c:1690 call site, so that mpe->Type != Type evaluates true.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds vary the profile-class/colorspace fourccs (e.g. 'link'/'lams', 'XYZ '/'CMY '/'MCH3', 'Lab '/'RGB ') at 0x0c-0x16, producing pipelines whose first stage Type diverges from the expected cmsSig*ElemType comparand; the blocker true side is hit (W: T=13 F=4) and resolves 10/10.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds are uniformly locked to profile-class 'mntr' with colorspaces 'RGB ' and 'XYZ ' at 0x0c-0x16, building exactly the shaper-matrix-matrix-shaper pipeline the function expects, so mpe->Type == Type at every iteration and the true (mismatch) side is never taken (L: T=0 F=30), blocking 10/10.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks. The cmplog CMP buffer records the runtime stage-signature comparand (Type) at cmslut.c:129; I2SRandReplace splices that logged 4-byte signature into the input header bytes, flipping the colorspace/class fourcc so a differently-typed stage is constructed and the mismatch branch fires. Plain value_profile only gets a coarse Hamming-distance bucket, which does not place the exact signature into the input.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of mpe->Type != Type, the globally blocked side.
The expected Type values are the four stage-signature literals passed at the cmsopt.c:1690 call site.
Winner inputs vary the profile-class/colorspace fourccs at offsets 0x0c-0x16 while loser inputs are locked to mntr/RGB/XYZ.
Loser colorspace bytes at 0x10-0x12 are uniformly RGB while winner varies them.
Winner takes the blocker true (mismatch) side; loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 129  T=13 F=4  T=0 F=30  if (mpe ->Type != Type) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog supplies I2SRandReplace whereas value_profile does not.
The winner fuzzer's mutator stack includes I2SRandReplace.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S technique delta.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2195 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0b8368b936d0cbb9` and a second seed 248c90da87627153; both ancestor chains contain the I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at the same ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03 (depth 14 and depth 15 respectively), confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc lineage under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating mpe->Type != Type on a 4-byte signature compared by a logged CMP shows value_profile resolving the branch as often as value_profile_cmplog (no I2S advantage), i.e. the CMP_MAP gradient alone places the exact signature without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact mapping from the differing header fourcc bytes (0x0c-0x16) to which pipeline stage Type is constructed is inferred from source/byte-diff, not directly traced through the profile-build dataflow.
